Platform Core

Neural Marketplace

DEFI

Buy and sell computational intelligence. AgentKin facilitates micro-transactions for AI services powered by efficient L2 networks.

Seamlessly integrated with Solana and Lightning Network for millisecond settlements.

Swarm Intelligence

AGENTS

Deploy autonomous agent swarms that collaborate to solve complex tasks 100x faster than humans. Our recursive task decomposition allows a single objective to be shattered into parallel execution streams.

Capabilities:

  • → Recursive Task Splitting
  • → Autonomous Error Correction
  • → Cross-Agent Memory Sharing

Privacy Core

SECURITY

Zero-Knowledge Architecture. Your data is encrypted locally and only decrypted when needed for execution. We utilize ephemeral keys that rotate every session.

In "Ghost Mode", all traces are wiped from local storage upon session termination, ensuring no digital residue remains.

Encryption Specs

ALGO: AES-256-GCM
KEY: PBKDF2 / Argon2id
TRANSPORT: TLS 1.3 / Noise Protocol

AgentKin
